name: Diamond & Gold Buyers of Pittsburgh
description_short: Diamond & Gold Buyers of Pittsburgh operates 7 locations across the Pittsburgh area, buying gold, diamonds, silver, coins, and jewelry for cash with consistent hours and transparent local operations.
description_long:
Diamond & Gold Buyers of Pittsburgh is a multi-location precious metals and jewelry buyer operating across the greater Pittsburgh region. The company maintains seven physical locations in Cranberry, Fox Chapel, Natrona Heights, Peters Township, Sewickley, West Mifflin, and White Oak, providing convenient access to residents across Allegheny County and surrounding areas. Founded on the business model of purchasing precious metals and jewelry directly from consumers, the company positions itself as a quick-cash option for those liquidating valuables. Each location operates independently with its own phone line and address, suggesting a locally-rooted operation rather than a national chain, though unified branding indicates coordinated management and pricing standards.

The company's primary service is purchasing precious metals and gemstones directly from consumers. They explicitly advertise buying diamonds, gold, silver, coins, and jewelry, as well as gift cards. Their model operates on immediate cash payment, which is the central appeal for consumers needing quick liquidity. All seven locations maintain consistent business hours: Monday through Saturday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, with Sunday closures. The Natrona Heights location, featured on this profile page, is situated in a mall environment at Highlands Mall Drive, suggesting foot traffic accessibility and retail visibility.

The company's distinguishing features include its multi-location footprint across a concentrated metropolitan area, which eliminates the need for consumers to travel far for service. The consistent hours across all locations and the explicit "We Pay Cash" messaging emphasize speed and convenience. The inclusion of gift cards alongside precious metals suggests they accept a broader range of items than strict gold buyers, potentially appealing to consumers with varied inventory to liquidate. The mall locations (notably at Highlands Mall in Natrona Heights) provide accessibility compared to standalone storefronts.

As a pawn-shop style precious metals buyer, the main caveat is that consumers should understand they will receive significantly less than spot market value or retail replacement cost for their items—this is the fundamental business model. No pricing information, buyback guarantees, or appraisal transparency is provided on the website, which is typical for this category but means consumers should compare offers across locations before selling. The company's local, multi-location structure is actually an advantage here, as customers can shop offers between nearby branches.
address: 68 Highlands Mall Dr, Natrona Heights, PA 15065

company_info.headquarters: 68 Highlands Mall Dr, Natrona Heights, PA 15065

pros: Seven convenient locations across greater Pittsburgh reduces travel distance for most consumers
Consistent business hours (10am-6pm Mon-Sat) across all locations enable reliable service access
Immediate cash payment model eliminates delays in receiving funds after sale
Accepts multiple asset types beyond gold (diamonds, silver, coins, jewelry, gift cards) in one transaction
Mall-based locations (Highlands Mall, others) provide accessible retail environments with foot traffic
Independent phone numbers for each location enable direct contact without call routing
Unified branding suggests standardized pricing and appraisal practices across locations
cons: No pricing transparency, buyback rates, or appraisal methodology disclosed on website
No information on credentials, certifications, or industry affiliations provided
Closed Sundays, limiting accessibility for weekend-only availability consumers
No online appointment booking, valuation tools, or pre-sale consultation options available
Website lacks customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials to assess service quality or fairness
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own gold, diamonds, or jewelry and can travel to a physical location
People liquidating inherited jewelry or precious metals collections locally without shipping concerns
Those with multiple small items (coins, gift cards, jewelry) wanting single-stop conversion to cash
Residents within the Pittsburgh metro area seeking a convenient alternative to mail-in precious metals buyers
diagnosis: Best for Pittsburgh-area residents with precious metals, jewelry, or coins to liquidate who prioritize convenience and immediate cash over maximum pricing. Main caveat: consumers will receive wholesale/melt-value pricing significantly below retail or spot rates, and should compare offers across the seven locations or other buyers before selling, as pricing transparency is not provided and rates may vary by store.
meta_description: Diamond & Gold Buyers operates 7 Pittsburgh locations buying gold, diamonds, silver, coins, and jewelry.
